semantic_text: Update package lock after merge
I didn't like functionToCall :-)
Working with Dakota
Start on getting posts via terms

changes block-imports reference

This ensures that npm can properly resolve all dependencies from the main package into the development environment. The fix allows the Gutenberg blocks to load correctly by making the package's dependencies available to the development environment.

Also specifically adds classnames as a root dependency since webpack needs it there

Fetches and displays posts based on term slug

Refactors the block to dynamically fetch posts based on a term slug selected in the editor.

It uses `useEffect` hooks to manage state and trigger data fetching based on changes to the term slug and term data.
This ensures that the post query is only executed when the term data is available.
Additionally, it replaces the placeholder content with a dynamic list of posts.
